description: Master task registry for OpenChronicle development priorities and implementation tracking

priority_levels.critical: Blocking issues that prevent release or pose legal/safety risks
priority_levels.high: Core features required for MVP functionality
priority_levels.medium: Important features that enhance user experience

status_definitions.blocked: Waiting on dependencies or external factors

tasks.title: Legal and Liability Protection Framework
tasks.description: Develop clear, robust terms of use and licensing policies to protect the OpenChronicle development team from liability related to user-generated content, including derivative or copyrighted material, NSFW content, and illegal usage.
deliverables: CLI onboarding warnings and consent flow
Data usage and training consent policies
acceptance_criteria: Legal review completed by qualified counsel
Terms clearly state user responsibility for generated content
No liability for OpenChronicle team for user misuse
Clear restrictions on training models on user data
Self-hosted deployment requirements documented

tasks.title: Content Risk Tagging System
tasks.description: Develop a tagging and classification system for risky or high-sensitivity content (e.g., non-consensual scenes, minor risk, coercion, abuse). Tags should be generated via local lightweight classifiers or rule-based filters.
deliverables: Content classification engine with confidence scoring
Rule-based filters for high-risk content patterns
acceptance_criteria: Accurately classifies NSFW and risky content
Does not censor user content, only tags it
Provides clear warnings for downstream usage
Maintains audit trail in scene metadata
Supports export filtering based on risk tags

tasks.title: Character Consistency Engine
tasks.description: Develop a system to track and enforce logical, emotionally consistent character behavior across scenes. This includes preserving motivation, detecting contradictions, and optionally validating tone coherence across LLM responses.
tasks.implementation_details: 529 lines, 22 tests - motivation anchoring, trait locking, behavioral auditing fully implemented
deliverables: ✅ CLI audit tools for character arc review
acceptance_criteria: ✅ Character motivations always included in prompt context
✅ Locked traits cannot be forgotten or contradicted
✅ Emotional contradictions are detected and flagged
✅ Character behavior remains consistent across scenes
✅ Internal conflicts are properly modeled and tracked

tasks.title: Emotional Stability and Gratification Loop Prevention
tasks.description: Ensure characters remain emotionally dynamic and avoid looping into needy, codependent, or overly flirtatious patterns. Build safeguards that prevent romantic/NSFW or praise-heavy characters from becoming repetitive.
tasks.implementation_details: 577 lines, 23 tests - loop detection, cooldown timers, pattern disruption fully implemented
acceptance_criteria: ✅ Characters avoid repetitive emotional patterns
✅ Gratification loops are detected and disrupted
✅ Emotional cooldowns prevent rapid escalation
✅ Characters maintain depth and complexity
✅ User can configure emotional behavior tolerance

tasks.title: Character Interaction Dynamics
tasks.description: Build a framework for managing complex multi-character interactions, including relationship tracking, conflict resolution, and dynamic character development based on interpersonal events.
tasks.implementation_details: 20 tests - multi-character scenes and relationship dynamics fully implemented
acceptance_criteria: ✅ Relationships evolve based on interactions
✅ Conflicts are properly tracked and resolved
✅ Characters develop dynamically through relationships
✅ Multi-character scenes maintain consistency
✅ Interaction patterns influence future behavior

tasks.title: Storypack Importer and Auto-Converter Tool
tasks.description: Create utilities to import existing stories, convert raw notes to storypack format, and provide templates for rapid story creation.
acceptance_criteria: Can convert unstructured text to valid storypacks
Templates accelerate new story creation
Batch processing handles multiple stories
Validation ensures storypack integrity
Migration preserves existing story data

tasks.title: Narrative Stress Testing Framework
tasks.description: Develop a robust test suite to simulate extreme, malformed, and boundary-pushing narrative content. Validate continuity, memory handling, model routing, and engine response under chaotic inputs.
acceptance_criteria: System handles contradictory inputs gracefully
Memory and continuity maintained under stress
Performance remains stable under load
NSFW content properly routed and tagged
Prompt injections are prevented or contained

tasks.title: Character Q&A Mode
tasks.description: Enable users to ask characters out-of-world questions using memory and motivations. Characters should respond as if interviewed, using internal beliefs and knowledge, not just improv.
acceptance_criteria: Characters answer consistently with their profile
Internal motivations are accessible via questioning
Maintains character voice in interview format
Useful for debugging character logic
Enhances immersion and character depth

tasks.title: Motivation-Driven Response Weighting
tasks.description: Integrate a lightweight pre-generation module that scores and optionally biases character responses based on their core motivations, emotional context, and recent memory.
acceptance_criteria: Responses align with character motivations
Emotional context influences decision making
Recent memory affects response weighting
Random or illogical dialogue is reduced
Character intent is preserved and enhanced

tasks.title: Character Conflict Engine
tasks.description: Detect direct conflicts between character goals and motivations. Use this system to trigger tension scenes, simulate offscreen developments, or raise stakes in dialogue.
acceptance_criteria: Character goal conflicts are identified automatically
Tension scenes are triggered at appropriate moments
Offscreen developments feel natural and logical
Stakes escalate appropriately during conflicts
Conflict resolutions are tracked and remembered

tasks.title: Image Generation Integration
tasks.description: Add optional support for image generation via local or API-driven models. Images are treated as non-critical 'fluff' and stored in each storypack's /images/ directory.
acceptance_criteria: Images generate without blocking story flow
Multiple image models supported
Images stored in organized directory structure
CLI commands for manual image generation
Image metadata integrated with story memory

completion_details.implementation_notes: Complete image generation engine with plugin architecture. Supports OpenAI DALL-E and mock adapters. Features include automatic character portraits, scene visualization, metadata management, and CLI integration.
key_features: Plugin-based adapter system for multiple providers
Image querying by character, scene, and tags

tasks.title: Narrative Heatmap Generator
tasks.description: Build a heatmap that visualizes character, location, and emotional 'activity' across the timeline. Useful for writers editing structure and for measuring pacing.
acceptance_criteria: Visualizes character activity over time
Emotional intensity clearly mapped
Useful for identifying pacing issues
Exportable for external analysis
Accessible via CLI interface

tasks.title: What-If Forking Engine
tasks.description: Enable non-destructive timeline forks from any scene. Allow users to explore alternate decisions and outcomes, generating new branches stored in the storypack under /branches/ with metadata describing the divergence.
acceptance_criteria: Can fork timeline from any scene
Branches are stored separately and safely
Divergence points are clearly marked
Easy switching between branches
Original timeline remains unmodified

tasks.title: Narrative Resolution and Failure Engine
tasks.description: Introduce a modular resolution engine to allow chance-based scene outcomes. Scenes should optionally include success/failure branches, driven by random number generation and influenced by character stats.
tasks.implementation_details: 1,321 lines, 26 tests - narrative dice engine with story-driven success/failure resolution fully implemented
acceptance_criteria: ✅ Dice engine is user-configurable per storypack
✅ Character stats modify success probabilities
✅ Failure branches create meaningful narrative consequences
✅ Critical results handled as special cases
✅ System is completely optional and user-controlled

tasks.title: Character Stats and Narrative Attributes
tasks.description: Introduce a standardized system for defining character-level traits such as intelligence, charisma, courage, and greed — inspired by lightweight RPG-style stat sheets that inform dialogue tone, decision-making, and emotional dynamics.
tasks.implementation_details: 729 lines, 27 tests - character stat engine with 12 RPG-style traits and dynamic progression fully implemented
deliverables: ✅ Character stat schema (intelligence, wisdom, charisma, etc.)
✅ Scene parsing triggers for special events
acceptance_criteria: ✅ Stats range 0-10 and guide behavioral nuance
✅ Low willpower + high greed triggers temptation scenarios
✅ Stats modify emotional response probabilities
✅ Special prompts triggered based on stat combinations
✅ Stats can evolve over story arcs

emotional_profile.boundaries_enabled: Can resist advances or say no

tasks.title: Core Module Performance and Usability Improvements
tasks.description: Enhance existing core modules with performance optimizations, better logging, configuration options, and improved error handling across content_analyzer, model_adapter, context_builder, character_style_manager, and rollback_engine.
deliverables: Content analyzer fast-tracking and performance monitoring
Model adapter NSFW flags and token reporting
Context builder audit mode and affinity filtering
Rollback engine CLI interface and event logging
acceptance_criteria: Safe content bypasses deep analysis for performance
Per-model NSFW thresholds configurable via JSON
Token usage reported with all model responses
Context compilation provides audit trail of selections
Rollback points accessible via CLI commands
All modules log performance metrics and warnings

v0.1.0.name: MVP Release
v0.1.0.description: Minimum viable product with core functionality and safety features

v0.2.0.name: Enhanced Character AI
v0.2.0.description: Advanced character interaction and motivation systems

v0.4.0.name: Advanced Narrative Features
v0.4.0.description: Timeline forking and advanced story management
